ui.omtreloaded.lore.turret_attack_speed_: Increases all attached turrets' attack speed by 20% when placed in a turret base.
ui.omtreloaded.lore.turret_creative_batt: Generates infinite energy when placed in a turret base.
ui.omtreloaded.lore.turret_mini_reactor_: Generates power when placed in a turret base.
ui.omtreloaded.lore.turret_solar_panel_u: Generates 20RF/t while exposed to the sun when placed in a turret base.
